name: Clinical Reference Kit
use_case: Physicians, APPs, and clinical pharmacists needing instant access to drug information, clinical evidence, medical calculations, and genomic data at the point of care.

mcps.why: FDA drug info, WHO data, RxNorm drug interactions, and clinical reference.
Clinical trials, medical calculators, ICD-10, and DICOM metadata access.
Genomics, pharmacogenomics, gene-drug interactions, and variant interpretation.

example_prompts: What are the drug interactions between metformin and contrast dye?
Calculate the CHA2DS2-VASc score for a 72-year-old male with CHF and diabetes
Search PubMed for the latest meta-analysis on GLP-1 agonists and cardiovascular outcomes
Look up clinical trials for pediatric ALL with CAR-T therapy
What pharmacogenomic considerations exist for clopidogrel in CYP2C19 poor metabolizers?
notes: Reference-only bundle. No PHI handling. Safe for educational and clinical reference use.
